global.description: The ad features a full canvas background with the 'VantaStyle' logo positioned at the top left. The main subject is a prominent headline stating 'Limited stock Only this weekend' centered in the middle of the ad. A call to action button labeled 'Watch now' is located at the bottom center, while a price tag of '€9.99' is displayed at the bottom left. A 'SALE' badge is positioned at the top right, enhancing the urgency of the offer. Decorative elements are strategically placed to add visual interest without overwhelming the main message.
global.visual_style: Modern design with vibrant colors and clear typography
global.main_message: Limited stock available for a special price this weekend

elements.label: VantaStyle text logo
elements.description: The logo of the VantaStyle app, displayed prominently in the top left corner of the ad.

elements.label: Limited stock message
elements.description: Text indicating limited stock availability, positioned centrally within the crop.

elements.label: Call to Action
elements.description: A button with the text 'Watch now' indicating an action for the user to take.

elements.label: Price Tag
elements.description: A small text element displaying the price, located in the lower part of the ad.

elements.label: Sale Badge
elements.description: A yellow rectangular badge with the word 'SALE' in bold black text, positioned at the top right corner of the ad.

elements.label: Segmented crop of a panel
elements.description: A green rectangular panel with a diagonal line, likely part of the background or design element.

elements.label: Segmented crop
elements.description: A green rectangular shape with a diagonal line, possibly part of a larger design element.

elements.label: Segmented crop
elements.description: A green rectangular shape with a diagonal line, possibly a decorative element.
